entity.label: Jegar-sahadutha
entity.subtitle: Place
entity.description: Pile of testimony, the Aramaic or Syriac name which Laban gave to the pile of stones erected as a memorial of the covenant between him and Jacob (Gen. 31:47), who, however, called it in Hebrew by an equivalent name, Galeed (q.v.).

nodes.label: Jegar-sahadutha
nodes.description: Pile of testimony, the Aramaic or Syriac name which Laban gave to the pile of stones erected as a memorial of the covenant between him and Jacob (Gen. 31:47), who, however, called it in Hebrew by an equivalent name, Galeed (q.v.).

verses.text: And Laban called it Jegarsahadutha: but Jacob called it Galeed.
